POV: You went on a romantic SEAcation @resortsworldcruises @resortsworldcruises.in 
🛳️❤️👫🏻

We took the 2 nights Dubai - Sir Bani Yas - Dubai cruise which is perfect for a weekend getaway. The cruise departs from Dubai Cruise Terminal 2 at 9PM on a Friday and returns at 12NN on Sunday. 

Other cruise routes available are:
* EVERY SUNDAY
Dubai - Khasab - Muscat - Dubai (3N)
* EVERY WEDNESDAY
Dubai - Doha - Dubai (2N)

transcription.text: I don't want to lose you now I'm looking right at the other half of me But they can see the set in my heart There's a space in there to hold Show me how to fight for now
